name: Motion Design Ad
description: Kinetic-typography / motion-graphics ad for software, SaaS, apps and tech products. UI shots, geometric splits, particle bursts, light-beam scans, code-to-product morphs. 9:16 by default (15-30s); also 16:9 for YouTube pre-roll and 1:1 for LinkedIn. Reference-required: a real brand logo / product screenshot / UI capture must be supplied — AI-improvised UI on a branded product reads as fake. Stack: gemini-3-pro keyframes (with brand reference), kling-v3.0-pro 5s i2v, ElevenLabs music for the beat-driven backbone (typically electronic, 120-140 BPM).

stackSummary.keyframes: google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview via OpenRouter, multi-ref WITH user-supplied brand logo / UI screenshot / product mockup (required for any frame where brand or product UI is visible)
stackSummary.i2v: kwaivgi/kling-v3.0-pro via OpenRouter, 5s clips (3-6 total), generate_audio: false. Best for kinetic UI motion, particle systems, light beams, and morph transitions when prompted with explicit motion verbs and easing curves.
stackSummary.voiceover: ElevenLabs eleven_multilingual_v2 — optional; many motion-design ads run music-only with text-on-screen. When VO is used, single confident take, mid-tempo, sync to beat hits.
stackSummary.captions: OpenRouter whisper-1 → KineticCaptions or HormoziCaptions; type-on / scale-in entrance synced to beat. Caption is a first-class visual element here, not an accessibility afterthought.
stackSummary.music: ElevenLabs Music — single track, electronic / synth / cinematic-electronic, 120-140 BPM. Beat hits drive every cut and CTA reveal. One music_v1 call, full-duration.

variationAxes: hook type (data-explosion, UI-morph, glitch-to-clean, light-beam-scan, particle-burst-from-logo, isometric-zoom, hand-interaction)
visual style (Dark Premium, Clean Minimal, Abstract Data, Isometric Tech, Gradient Brand, Neon Cyber, Glassmorphism, Bold Geometric, Tech Noir, Futuristic Minimalist)
product category (SaaS dashboard, mobile app, AI/data product, dev tool, B2B platform, consumer app, fintech)
duration & aspect (6-15s 9:16 for Reels/TikTok, 15-30s 16:9 for YouTube pre-roll, 20-30s 1:1 for LinkedIn)
doNotCopyLiterally: Specific UI layouts, brand colors, exact prompts, specific metrics. Vibe and motion grammar only.
referenceNotes: Brand logo, UI screenshot, product mockup, or app screen capture is REQUIRED. The reference-required gate (AGENTS.md hard rule #3) refuses if no reference exists at workspace/projects/<id>/assets/uploaded/. AI-improvised UI on a branded product is never acceptable — fake screens read instantly. If the user has no real UI yet (pre-launch), they must supply at minimum the logo + a wireframe / Figma export; log as `stage: "wireframe-ref"`.
